is, one, you need to discover what is available to you, and you can see, you can make a parallel with CloudCode, you're asking CloudCode to do something, the first thing he's going to do is going to discover what the code base looks like, for an agent that is operating, not for code, but for like a different type of task, they also need to discover what data is available to them, so that might be, okay, where can I find information about Erik across all these different data silos, all these different services?

And that's what I call the discovery and search phase, and that's a place where actually the existing product of AirVide is very, very strong, which is we know how to pull every single piece of data from the system, and we know how to create what we call entity caches.
And then the second one is more about, like, when we think about the loop of an agent, it's just discover, then it's actually getting the data itself, like the relevant data.

you.

When you are in the world with Airbytes and the agentic data platform, all of this information is available through very simple agentic tooling, where you've just enabled and provided some credentials, and Airbytes will take care of how do you connect to the service, how do you manage authentication, how do you manage permissioning of the data, how do you manage the indexing of And how do you make it efficient and fast for users, plus all the maintenance of like, how do you make these connectors better over time, when APIs are changing, when rate limiting are changing, like all the things that people hate doing is something that we're exposed to very, very simple endpoints, and they never have to worry about that complexity.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To map Airbyte's agentic data platform and its value for AI engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=58.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airbyte’s platform enables autonomous agents by automating the `Discover → Fetch → Act` data loop, replacing manual data pipeline builds and maintenance.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [The platform uses two connector types: `Replication Connectors` build a cross-silo `Entity Cache` for discovery, while `Direct Connectors` provide real-time data access and writes.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [The `Entity Cache` is the platform's core differentiator, enabling agents to autonomously discover data across systems (e.g., finding "Invesco" in Zendesk, Jira, and Salesforce). Competitors like Merge offer only direct fetch.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
  - [`Direct Connectors` are the source of truth; the `Entity Cache` provides a stale data fallback, ensuring agents can operate even if a source API is down.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)

## Topics

### The Agentic Data Loop

  - [Airbyte's platform automates the `Discover → Fetch → Act` loop, the core process for agents to access and use internal company data.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Discover:** Find relevant data across all connected systems.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [**Fetch:** Retrieve the most up-to-date, permissioned data from the source.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [**Act:** Perform actions like updating records or triggering workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Platform Components & Workflow

  - [**Entity Cache (Discovery Layer):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Built by `Replication Connectors` mirroring data from all sources (e.g., Zendesk, Salesforce).](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Enables agents to autonomously discover data across silos without needing specific IDs.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [Example: An agent can find all data related to "Invesco" across all systems, not just a pre-defined Zendesk ticket ID.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**Direct Connectors (Fetch & Act Layer):**](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [Embeddable tools for agents to perform real-time `Read` and `Write` operations.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [`Read` access is available now; `Write` functionality is planned for January.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=982.0)
      - [Serve as the source of truth; if a source API is down, the agent can fall back to the `Entity Cache` for stale data.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=2304.0)
  - [**Auth Module:**](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)
      - [Enforces fine-grained, user-level data access policies.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1961.0)
      - [Example: A payroll agent can only see compensation data for its user's team.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=2031.0)

### Competitive Advantage

  - [**Problem:** Building agents without Airbyte requires massive, ongoing effort for:](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [Connector development and maintenance (API changes, rate limits).](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [Auth and permission management.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [Data replication and indexing for discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Solution:** Airbyte provides a single API key that handles all data infrastructure, freeing teams to focus on agent logic.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [**Differentiator:** The `Entity Cache` enables true agent autonomy. Competitors like Merge offer only direct fetch, requiring agents to be manually prompted with specific IDs.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)

### Future Vision

  - [**Ontology:** The `Entity Cache` is the first step toward a full ontology, which will provide a unified, cross-system definition of core business entities like "Customer."](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [**Deployment:**](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [`Direct Connectors` are available now for rapid agent prototyping.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [The full cloud product with the `Entity Cache` will enter private beta in February.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Khrushal:** Share the internal Airbyte agentic data platform document with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)
  - [**Erik:** Review the document and follow up with questions via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/KxtkuDWnMDcsFqP_yrNqL4m2GZzTT_2t?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)

action_items.description: Share agentic data platform doc w/ Erik (growthx.ai) via Slack
